channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Joe Rogan expresses concern over Theo Von's mental health; Von denies issues on social media
item.description: In a recent episode of The Joe Rogan Experience, comedian and podcaster Joe Rogan expressed serious concerns about the mental health of fellow comedian and podcaster Theo Von. Rogan highlighted Von's ...

item.title: László Nemes discusses antisemitism, Holocaust memory, and challenges in the film industry
item.description: Hungarian director László Nemes, renowned for his award-winning Holocaust film Son of Saul, has returned with his new drama Orphan and a Jean Moulin biopic, Moulin, premiering at Cannes. In a candid i...

item.title: Senate Prepares to Hear Sara Duterte Impeachment Case Amid Leadership Uncertainty
item.description: The Senate of the Philippines is set to convene as an impeachment court on Monday, May 18, 2026, to hear the highly anticipated case of Vice President Sara Duterte. This trial is being closely monitor...

item.title: Labor confronts voter scepticism over challenging federal budget
item.description: Following the recent federal budget, Labor faces a tough challenge in persuading voters of its merits. Post-budget polling suggests that many Australians view it as one of the worst in decades, with c...

item.title: Yobe APC governorship aspirants insist on primaries, reject consensus choice
item.description: Three Yobe APC governorship aspirants, namely Mustapha Maihaja, Bashir Machina, and Kashim Tumsah, don reject the emergence of Baba Malam Wali as the party's consensus candidate. The trio, who are col...

item.title: AI Amplifies Public Attention on Wall Street Sexual Harassment Lawsuit
item.description: A sexual harassment lawsuit filed by former JPMorgan Chase banker Chirayu Rana against female executive Lorna Hajdini has become a complex mix of legal allegations and AI-driven misinformation. The la...

item.title: A Look at Honolulu’s 1975 Parades and Hawaiian Cultural Celebrations
item.description: The Honolulu parades of 1975 offer a vivid glimpse into Hawaii’s cultural and social life during the 1970s. Major celebrations like the King Kamehameha Day Floral Parade and the Aloha Festivals became...

item.title: Independent Film Industry Faces Market Shift but Finds New Ways to Reach Audiences
item.description: The independent film industry is undergoing a significant transformation as traditional revenue models crumble. Once-reliable mechanisms, such as the pay-one television window, which enabled pre-sales...

item.title: Man to appear in court over alleged sexual abuse of 11-year-old girl
item.description: A 32-year-old man is scheduled to appear in the Atlantis Magistrate’s Court on Monday, May 18, after being arrested on Friday, May 15, following a warrant for his arrest. He is accused of impregnating...

item.title: Controversial Danish Vaccine Research Influences US Policy Amid Scientific Scrutiny
item.description: Peter Aaby and Christine Stabell Benn, Danish researchers with decades of work in Guinea-Bissau, have long promoted the idea of 'non-specific effects' of vaccines—suggesting that live vaccines like me...

item.title: Senate formally convenes impeachment court for Vice President Sara Duterte trial
item.description: The Philippine Senate officially convened as an impeachment court on May 18, 2026, to begin proceedings for the trial of Vice President Sara Duterte. This development follows the House of Representati...

item.title: Australia endorses GLP-1 medications for managing obesity and cardiovascular risk
item.description: Australia has taken a significant step in managing obesity and heart disease, with the Clinical Consensus Statement now endorsing Semaglutide and other GLP-1 medications for those at risk of cardiovas...

item.title: Insights from a UK Property Auction Amid the Housing Crisis
item.description: The article provides an in-depth look at the realities of property auctions in the UK and their link to the housing crisis. At a central London auction, homes are sold rapidly, ranging from repossesse...

item.title: Maharashtra Coaching Institute Director Arrested in NEET Paper Leak Case
item.description: The Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) has arrested Shivraj Raghunath Motegaonkar, director of Renukai Chemistry Classes in Latur, Maharashtra, in connection with the NEET-UG 2026 exam paper leak. ...

item.title: Graduation Speakers Face Mixed Reactions When Discussing AI
item.description: During the 2026 commencement season, some speakers discovered that talking about artificial intelligence (AI) at graduation ceremonies can provoke strong reactions from students. At the University of ...

item.title: Venezuela Fury and Noah Price Begin Married Life Together in Caravan Following Wedding
item.description: Venezuela Fury, aged 16, and her husband Noah Price, 19, have embarked on their married life after a lavish wedding on the Isle of Man. The ceremony took place at the Victorian Royal Chapel of St John...

item.title: Techire SHS Students Receive Civic Education on Integrity and Rule of Law
item.description: On May 17, 2026, the National Commission for Civic Education (NCCE) conducted a civic sensitization program for students of Techire Senior High School in the Tano North Municipality of Ghana's Ahafo R...

item.title: JI Files Petition in FCC Against Petroleum Levy Claiming Constitutional Violations
item.description: Islamabad: Jamaat-i-Islami (JI) chief Hafiz Naeemur Rehman on Monday approached the Federal Constitutional Court (FCC) challenging the government’s petroleum levy, arguing that it grants unrestricted ...

item.title: Los Angeles Mayoral Candidates Focus on Latino Voters Ahead of June Primary
item.description: With Latinos comprising nearly 37% of Los Angeles' electorate, securing their votes is a central strategy for mayoral candidates ahead of the June 2 primary. Incumbent Mayor Karen Bass currently holds...

item.title: Osun State Governor Strengthens School Security After Oyo Kidnapping
item.description: Governor Ademola Adeleke of Osun State don tok say him don order make dem revive the Safe School Initiative sharply after di recent school abduction wey happen for Oyo State. The incident involve band...
